title: Management of health and safety in defence - chapter 39: retention of records (JSP 375, volume 1)
body: "Chapter 39 is split into two parts: Part 1 Directive, which provides direction that you must follow to comply with health and safety law, government policy and defence policy; and Part 2 Guidance, which provides the guidance and good practice that should be followed to help you to keep to this policy. "
